##NAMES=Sarabauite
##RRUFFID=R060495
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Sb_4_S_6_·CaSb_6_O_10_
##LOCALITY=Sarabau mine, near Bau, Sarawak, Borneo (Malaysia)
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Red tabular crystals associated with white wollastonite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060495
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ca_1.00_Sb^3+^_10.00_O_10_S_6.00_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
